display_text: Miniboss Minion Summoner, Tier: Artifact: Summons a powerful miniboss minion with protective abilities for 20 seconds. The minion creates a 900 radius aura that grants allies within range a damage-absorbing barrier, reflecting 40% of incoming damage back to attackers. Minions disappear after 120 seconds without taking damage. Stats: CD: 40s, Duration: 20s, Max Barrier HP%: 40%, Owner Barrier HP%: 25%, Barrier Regen Time: 2s, Barrier Decay Time: 1s, Damage Reflection: 40%, Damage CD: 1.5s.
